title: Compilation (Part 6): Where AI Surprises Us
desc: HBS faculty reflect on what about AI has most surprised them — the unexpected limits, capabilities, and second-order effects emerging across business.
title_zh: 合集（六）：AI 让我们意外之处
desc_zh: 哈佛商学院教授们反思 AI 最令他们意外的地方——那些出乎意料的局限、能力，以及在商业中浮现的二阶效应。

title: Felix Oberholzer-Gee on Winning with AI
desc: The case episode for this project: a strategist’s view of where AI creates real competitive advantage — and where it merely raises the table stakes.
title_zh: Felix Oberholzer-Gee 谈如何用 AI 取胜
desc_zh: 本项目的案例节目：从战略家的视角，剖析 AI 在哪些方面创造真正的竞争优势，又在哪些方面只是抬高了入场门槛。

title: Sunil Gupta on Marketing in the Age of AI
desc: How AI is reshaping marketing — from customer insight and personalization to the changing role of the marketing organization.
title_zh: Sunil Gupta 谈 AI 时代的市场营销
desc_zh: AI 如何重塑市场营销——从客户洞察、个性化，到营销组织角色的转变。

title: Compilation (Part 3): Mid-Career Strategies for an AI-Driven Workplace
desc: Felix Oberholzer-Gee, Nien-hê Hsieh, Sunil Gupta, and Linda Hill on how to stay relevant in an AI-driven workplace by building human skills and a “wayfinder” mindset.
title_zh: 合集（三）：AI 职场中的职业中期策略
desc_zh: Felix Oberholzer-Gee、Nien-hê Hsieh、Sunil Gupta 与 Linda Hill 探讨：如何通过培养人际技能与“探路者”心态，在 AI 驱动的职场中保持竞争力。

title: Compilation: “Will AI Take My Job?”
desc: Professors Nien-hê Hsieh, Christina Wallace, Joe Fuller, and Iavor Bojinov examine how AI is reshaping organizations, the nature of work, hiring, management, and trust.
title_zh: 合集：“AI 会抢走我的工作吗？”
desc_zh: Nien-hê Hsieh、Christina Wallace、Joe Fuller 与 Iavor Bojinov 共同探讨 AI 如何重塑组织、工作的本质，以及招聘、管理与信任。

title: Joe Fuller on AI and Rethinking Work
desc: Why organizations must rethink how work gets done — rather than simply bolting AI onto existing processes — to capture real value from the technology.
title_zh: Joe Fuller 谈 AI 与重新思考工作方式
desc_zh: 为什么组织必须重新思考工作的完成方式——而非简单地把 AI 嫁接到既有流程上——才能真正从这项技术中获取价值。

title: Sal Khan on AI Disruption and Learning
desc: Khan Academy founder Sal Khan joins Joe Fuller and Bill Kerr to discuss how AI is disrupting education, skills, and the workforce.
title_zh: Sal Khan 谈 AI 的颠覆与学习
desc_zh: 可汗学院创始人 Sal Khan 与 Joe Fuller、Bill Kerr 一起探讨 AI 如何颠覆教育、技能与劳动力。

title: Christina Wallace on AI and Entrepreneurship
desc: How founders are using AI to accelerate customer research, prototyping, branding, and operations — and how it is transforming entrepreneurship and creativity.
title_zh: Christina Wallace 谈 AI 与创业
desc_zh: 创始人如何利用 AI 加速客户调研、原型设计、品牌打造与运营，以及 AI 如何重塑创业与创造力。

title: Compilation (Part 1): Early Career Advice in the Age of AI
desc: HBS faculty including Linda A. Hill and Sunil Gupta share actionable advice for early-career professionals on pairing AI skills with foundational business knowledge.
title_zh: 合集（上）：AI 时代的职业早期建议
desc_zh: 包括 Linda A. Hill 与 Sunil Gupta 在内的哈佛商学院教授，为职业早期人士提供可落地的建议：如何将 AI 技能与扎实的商业基础结合起来。

title: Workforce Competitiveness and AI Scenarios
desc: How AI tools and training can help address labor shortages and skills gaps, and what different adoption scenarios mean for workforce competitiveness.
title_zh: 劳动力竞争力与 AI 的多种情景
desc_zh: AI 工具与培训如何帮助应对劳动力短缺与技能缺口，以及不同的采用情景对劳动力竞争力意味着什么。

title: Iavor Bojinov on AI Adoption, Trust, and Decision-Making
desc: Why AI adoption hinges on trust, how organizations can scale AI effectively, and what leaders must rethink to succeed in an AI-driven world. The premiere of the “Hello AI” season.
title_zh: Iavor Bojinov 谈 AI 的采用、信任与决策
desc_zh: 为什么 AI 的落地取决于信任，组织如何有效地规模化应用 AI，以及领导者必须重新思考什么才能在 AI 驱动的世界中取得成功。“Hello AI”系列的开篇之作。

title: Global Workforce Transformation Amid AI Disruption
desc: A look at how AI disruption is reshaping the global workforce, and what leaders and policymakers should prepare for.
title_zh: AI 颠覆下的全球劳动力转型
desc_zh: 审视 AI 的颠覆如何重塑全球劳动力，以及领导者和政策制定者应为此做好哪些准备。

title: Strategy Summit 2026: Why AI Means Radical Change
desc: What it takes for AI implementation to succeed — the minimum technological capabilities, overcoming organizational silos, and transforming workflows to add real value.
title_zh: 2026 战略峰会：为什么 AI 意味着彻底变革
desc_zh: AI 落地成功需要什么——最基本的技术能力、打破组织壁垒，以及重塑工作流程以创造真正价值。

title: Business Transformation: How to Become an AI Company?
desc: How established organizations can build the enterprise AI strategy and capabilities needed to transform and compete in a cloud- and algorithm-driven world.
title_zh: 业务转型：如何成为一家 AI 公司？
desc_zh: 成熟企业如何构建所需的企业级 AI 战略与能力，从而在以云和算法驱动的世界中实现转型并参与竞争。
